text: Passing through glass doors into a spacious, quiet corridor, I feel detached and reflective—a threshold between worlds. Inside, facing vibrant displays and the words "Responsive and rapidly evolving," I am swept by a gentle curiosity. The juxtaposition of ambiguity and innovation invites me to dwell in uncertainty, sheltered by purpose and possibility. This place feels both unfinished and full of hope, provoking thoughts about the future and my place within it.
